title: J4Angle Function
parameters: point	Optional.  Point expression.  If point is omitted, then the J4Angle setting of the current robot position is returned.
description:
Returns an integer value repreenting the angle of the Joint #4 when the axis centers of the Joint #4 and #6 are on the straight line.

The J4Angle attribute is used only for N robot series.
see_also:
Hand

J1Angle

J1Angle Function

J4Angle

J4Angle Function Example

Print J4Angle(pick)

Print J4Angle(P1)

Print J4Angle
examples:
Print J4Angle(pick)
Print J4Angle(P1)
Print J4Angle
